Struct HiringDate

Namespace
Day4_Red
Assembly
Day4_Red.dll

Represents a specific date used for hiring purposes.

public struct HiringDate : IComparable<HiringDate>
Implements
IComparable<HiringDate>
Inherited Members
ValueType.Equals(object)
ValueType.GetHashCode()
object.GetType()
object.Equals(object, object)
object.ReferenceEquals(object, object)

Remarks

hiring date is represented by three integer fields: day, month, and year.

Constructors

HiringDate(int, int, int)

initializes a new instance of the hiring date

public HiringDate(int _day, int _month, int _year)

Parameters

_day int

day of the date

_month int

month of the date

_year int

year of the date

Properties

day

gets or sets the day of the date

public int day { readonly get; set; }

Property Value

int

month

gets or sets the month of the date

public int month { readonly get; set; }

Property Value

int

year

gets or sets the year of the date

public int year { readonly get; set; }

Property Value

int

Methods

CompareTo(HiringDate)

compares hiring date based on datetime comparer function where the hiring date that was hired earlier is considered less than the one that was hired later

public int CompareTo(HiringDate other)

Parameters

other HiringDate

other date to compare with

Returns

int

negative if this date was before the other, positive if this date was after the other, and zero if they were on the same date

ToString()

creates a string representation of the hiring date in the format "day/month/year"

public override string ToString()

Returns

string

string representation of the hiring date
